creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:
The plugin was recently updated with the fix for the Unicode encoding.

Fix: 

The patch for the port is available here:
  http://codelabs.ru/fbsd/ports/trac-autocomplete/update-to-r8451.diff

It works fine with our Trac 0.12 and passed Tinderbox builds
for 7.x/8.x/9.x.
How-To-Repeat: 
http://trac-hacks.org/changeset/7270
http://trac-hacks.org/changeset/7293
